description_long: This object is a handheld flashlight with a cylindrical body, primarily black in color with blue accents around the lens and a blue button on the side. The front features a circular array of six LED bulbs set in a metallic reflector, surrounded by a blue ring. The body has a textured grip section for secure handling, and a visible brand label is printed on the side. The rear end is flat and unadorned, while the side view reveals a single prominent button for operation. The overall design is robust and functional, suitable for use in urban environments such as garages, streets, or during power outages.
description: A black and blue handheld flashlight with a textured grip, circular LED array, and a side button for operation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular LED array and blue accent ring.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the textured grip, blue button, and brand label.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat, unadorned end of the flashlight.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with grip texture and no visible button.
